name: AgEagle Aerial Systems Inc.
summary: AgEagle Aerial Systems Inc. (rebranded as EagleNXT in 2025) designs and delivers drones, sensors, and software for military/defense, public safety, surveying/mapping, agriculture, and utilities/engineering industries. Key products include the eBee line of fixed-wing UAVs, MicaSense multispectral and thermal cameras, and the Measure Ground Control SaaS platform. The company distributes through over 165 global resellers and has achieved BVLOS and Blue UAS certifications.

products.name: eBee TAC
products.description: NDAA-compliant fixed-wing drone for government/military mapping, weighing 3.5 lbs with up to 90 min flight time and AES256-bit encryption.

products.name: eBee VISION
products.description: Fixed-wing drone for commercial and government use in surveying, mapping, and related applications.

products.name: MicaSense Altum-PT
products.description: Next-generation thermal and multispectral sensor for agriculture, plant research, land management, and forestry.

products.name: MicaSense RedEdge-P
products.description: Next-generation multispectral sensor distributed in over 75 countries for drone-based imagery and data analytics.

products.name: Ground Control
products.description: Cloud-based SaaS drone fleet operating system by Measure; ceased operations December 31, 2024.
